songs.title: How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)
feed: “How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 2 spots to #1.
“How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 57 sales units.
“How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 95 streams units.
“How You Get the Girl (Taylor's Version)” by Taylor Swift is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 259,434 total units.
